Prepare System: Enable System Restore, configure creation frequency, and generate a 'Nyrex Tweaks Restore Point' before applying changes.
Run SFC and DISM scans to detect, verify, and repair corrupted Windows system files.

Boot Security: Enables test signing mode for driver debugging.
Enables x2APIC for better interrupt handling.
Turns off Virtualization Based Security and Hypervisor.
UAC & SmartScreen: Allows UAC prompts on the interactive desktop.
Turns off SmartScreen filters for apps and Edge.
Windows Defender: Stops and disables Windows Defender service.
Turns off scanning of downloaded files.
Prevents automatic sample submission to Microsoft.
Sets Defender processes to lowest priority class.
Process Mitigations: Disables Data Execution Prevention for all processes.
Disables Control Flow Guard security mechanism.
Disables Structured Exception Handler Overwrite Protection.
Blocks remote and low-label image loads.
Disables ROP Stack Pivot, Caller Check, and SimExec.
Blocks processes from creating child processes.
Removes custom mitigation overrides from registry.
Virtualization & DMA: Turns off Device Guard features (VBS, HVCI).
Disables Protected Process Light for LSA.
Disables DMA Remapping protection for all devices.
Data Collection Tasks: Stops Customer Experience Improvement Program tasks.
Stops Disk Diagnostic data collection tasks.
Stops Power Efficiency Diagnostics background tasks.
Stops Family Safety monitoring and refresh tasks.
Stops Windows System Assessment Tool tasks.
Disables Windows Error Reporting queue and UI.
Telemetry Services: Stops and disables the Connected User Experiences service.
Stops and disables the WAP Push Message Routing service.
Telemetry Registry: Blocks advertising ID generation and tracking.
Disables SmartScreen and web content scanning.
Turns off location sensors and scripting.
Blocks sensor data access for apps.
Stops various background WMI auto-logging sessions.
Disables third-party suggestions and consumer features.
Prevents automatic app updates from Microsoft Store.
Explorer / UI: Sets visual effects to 'Adjust for best performance'.
Disables showing window contents while dragging.
Removes the delay before menus appear.
Stops showing recent files in Explorer.
Stops showing frequent folders in Explorer.
Turns off tips, tricks, and suggestions in Windows.
Replaces search box with a simple button.
Disables web results in Start menu search.
Turns off Cloud Clipboard and Nearby Sharing.
Stops Windows from using diagnostics for personalization.
Turns off synchronization of Windows settings.
Boot Settings: Reduces boot menu wait time to 15 seconds.
Hides the Windows logo during boot.
Disables dynamic tick for more consistent timer interrupts.
Uses the hardware platform clock for better timing.
Turns off automatic system recovery on boot failure.

Disable Services: Adjusts Svchost splitting threshold based on RAM.
App Removal: Removes Bing News, Search, and Weather.
Removes Office hub and Solitaire Collection.
Removes Power Automate and To Do apps.
Removes the Windows Dev Home app.
Removes the Link to Windows integration.

Discord: Clear Caches
Deletes cache, GPU cache, logs, and crashpad data.
Disable Overlay
Turns off the in-game overlay via settings.json.
Disable Telemetry
Blocks Discord telemetry and usage tracking.
Disable Crash Reporting
Turns off automatic crash report sending.
Disable Animations
Turns off UI animations in Discord.
Disable Rich Presence
Turns off Rich Presence status broadcasting.
Disable HW Accel
Forces software rendering to save GPU resources.
Disable Autostart
Prevents Discord from launching on login.
Optimize Launch Args
Launches Discord with flags to disable vsync, sandbox, and logging.
Optimize Memory
Reduces the working set memory for Discord process.
Google Chrome: Stops sending usage statistics to Google.
Sets homepage and new tab to google.com.
Allows users to end processes via Task Manager.
Deletes Cache, Code Cache, and GPUCache folders.
Brave Browser: Turns off extended safe browsing reporting.
Turns off Brave Leo AI features.
Prevents Brave from running in background.
Forces WebRTC to disable non-proxied UDP.
Stops asking to be the default browser.
Spotify: Deletes cache, data, and log files.
Prevents Spotify from running on login.

Nvidia Profile: Downloads the latest Nvidia Profile Inspector.
Applies the Nyrex optimized profile settings.
Runs NVPI with the imported profile.
Nvidia Power: Prevents GPU from changing power states dynamically.
AMD Power: Stops AMD dynamic power state management.
Disables the AMD logging driver service.
MSI Mode: Enables Message Signaled Interrupts for the GPU.
Sets GPU interrupt priority to highest.

KBM / Mouse: Turns off Sticky Keys accessibility feature.
Turns off Filter Keys accessibility feature.
Turns off Toggle Keys accessibility feature.
Sets USB interrupt priority to highest.
Disables idle IRP for USB devices.
Disables D3 cold power state for USB.
Sets keyboard repeat rate to max (31).
Sets keyboard repeat delay to minimum (0).
Zeros out smooth mouse acceleration curves.
Power: Turns off Windows Power Throttling feature.
Sets GPU Energy Driver to auto start.
Sets timer interval to 0 for lower latency.
Priority: Adjusts priority separation to 0x26 for latency.
Network: Turns off automatic power saving mode.
Prevents dropping to 100mbps to save power.
Turns off specific NIC power saver.
Keeps full speed when power saving.
Disables wake on LAN from S5 state.
Sets link speed to 10Mbps in S5 state.

General: Shows known file extensions in Explorer.
Adds 'End task' to taskbar right-click menu.
Enables dark theme for system and apps.
Creates a desktop shortcut to MSInfo32.
Creates a desktop shortcut to reboot into BIOS.

Disable Notifications: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\Notifications" /v "DisableNotifications" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f
Lower Defender CPU Priority: reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\MsMpEng.exe\PerfOptions" /v "CpuPriorityClass" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\MsMpEngCP.exe\PerfOptions" /v "CpuPriorityClass" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f
Clear Mitigation Registry: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\*' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
Disable DMA Remapping: for /f %%i in ('reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services" /s /f DmaRemappingCompatible 2^>nul ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%i" /v "DmaRemappingCompatible" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable Setting Sync: for %%G in (Accessibility AppSync BrowserSettings Credentials DesktopTheme Language PackageState Personalization StartLayout Windows) do (reg add "HKCU\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\SettingSync\Groups\%%G" /v "Enabled" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul)
Optimize SvcHost Split: for /f "tokens=2 delims==" %%i in ('wmic os get TotalVisibleMemorySize /value') do set /a mem=%%i + 1024000 & reg add "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control" /v "SvcHostSplitThresholdInKB" /t REG_DWORD /d %mem% /f >nul 2>&1
Clear Caches: for %%d in ("Cache" "GPUCache" "Code Cache" "DawnCache" "logs" "Crashpad") do (if exist "%APPDATA%\discord\%%~d" rd /s /q "%APPDATA%\discord\%%~d" >nul 2>&1)
Disable Overlay: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p='%APPDATA%\discord\settings.json'; if (Test-Path $p) { $j = Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $j.settings) { $j | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'settings' -NotePropertyValue (@{}) -Force; } if (-not $j.settings.overlay) { $j.settings | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'overlay' -NotePropertyValue (@{}) -Force; } $j.settings.overlay.enabled = $false; $j | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path $p -Encoding UTF8; }"
Optimize Memory: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = Get-Process Discord -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($proc in $p) { try { [System.Diagnostics.Process]::GetProcessById($proc.Id).MinWorkingSet = 0 } catch {} };"
Clear User Caches: for /d %%P in ("%LOCALAPPDATA%\Google\Chrome\User Data\*") do (if exist "%%P\Cache" rmdir /s /q "%%P\Cache" 2>nul & if exist "%%P\Code Cache" rmdir /s /q "%%P\Code Cache" 2>nul & if exist "%%P\GPUCache" rmdir /s /q "%%P\GPUCache" 2>nul)
Disable Dynamic P-State: for /f %%f in ('wmic path Win32_VideoController get PNPDeviceID ^| findstr /L "PCI\VEN_"') do (for /f "tokens=3" %%b in ('reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%f" /v "Driver" 2^>nul') do (for /f %%g in ('echo %%b ^| findstr "{"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\%%g" /v "DisableDynamicPstate" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f >nul 2>&1)))
Enable GPU MSI Mode: for /f %%g in ('wmic path win32_videocontroller get PNPDeviceID ^| findstr /L "VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%g\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\MessageSignaledInterruptProperties" /v "MSISupported" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f >nul 2>&1 & reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%g\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\Affinity Policy" /v "DevicePriority" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Set Device Priority 0: for /f %%g in ('wmic path win32_videocontroller get PNPDeviceID ^| findstr /L "VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%g\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\Affinity Policy" /v "DevicePriority" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable AMD Ext. Events: sc config "AMD External Events Utility" start= disabled >nul 2>&1
Disable AMD Crash Report: sc stop "AMD Crash User Experience Reporting Service" >nul 2>&1
sc config "AMD Crash User Experience Reporting Service" start= disabled >nul 2>&1
Enable USB MSI Mode: for /f %%i in ('wmic path Win32_USBController get PNPDeviceID^| findstr /l "PCI\VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\MessageSignaledInterruptProperties" /v "MSISupported" /t REG_DWORD /d "1" /f >nul 2>&1 & reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\Affinity Policy" /v "DevicePriority" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Set USB Priority 0: for /f %%i in ('wmic path Win32_USBController get PNPDeviceID^| findstr /l "PCI\VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters\Interrupt Management\Affinity Policy" /v "DevicePriority" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable USB Idle IRP: for /f %%i in ('wmic path Win32_USBController get PNPDeviceID^| findstr /l "PCI\VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters" /v "AllowIdleIrpInD3" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable USB D3 Cold: for /f %%i in ('wmic path Win32_USBController get PNPDeviceID^| findstr /l "PCI\VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters" /v "D3ColdSupported" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable USB Suspend: for /f %%i in ('wmic path Win32_USBController get PNPDeviceID^| findstr /l "PCI\VEN_"') do (reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters" /v "EnableSelectiveSuspend" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1 & reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\%%i\Device Parameters" /v "EnhancedPowerManagementEnabled" /t REG_DWORD /d "0" /f >nul 2>&1)
Disable NIC Power Save: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "AutoPowerSaveModeEnabled" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "EnablePowerManagement" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "EnableWakeOnLan" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Gigabit Auto-Drop: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "AutoDisableGigabit" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Advanced EEE: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "AdvancedEEE" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Delayed Power Up: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "DisableDelayedPowerUp" /t REG_SZ /d "2" /f)
Disable EEE: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "*EEE" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "EEE" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "EEELinkAdvertisement" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetAdapter | ForEach-Object { Set-NetAdapterAdvancedProperty -Name $_.Name -DisplayName 'Energy Efficient Ethernet' -DisplayValue 'Disabled' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
Disable PME: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnablePME" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EEELinkAdvertisement" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Green Ethernet: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnableGreenEthernet" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Power Management: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnablePowerManagement" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "EnableSavePowerNow" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)

powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetAdapter | ForEach-Object { Set-NetAdapterAdvancedProperty -Name $_.Name -DisplayName 'Power Saving Mode' -DisplayValue 'Disabled' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
Disable Dynamic Power Gating: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnableDynamicPowerGating" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Connected Gating: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnableConnectedPowerGating" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Wake-on-LAN: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "EnableWakeOnLan" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "*WakeOnMagicPacket" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f & reg add "%%n" /v "*WakeOnPattern" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetAdapter | ForEach-Object { Set-NetAdapterAdvancedProperty -Name $_.Name -DisplayName 'Wake on LAN' -DisplayValue 'Disabled' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
Disable GigaLite: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "GigaLite" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Auto Power Saver: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "NicAutoPowerSaver" /t REG_SZ /d "2" /f)
Disable Power Down PLL: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "PowerDownPll" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Reduce Speed: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "ReduceSpeedOnPowerDown" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Smart Power Down: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "SmartPowerDownEnable" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable S5 NIC Override: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "S5NicKeepOverrideMacAddrV2" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable S5 WakeOnLan: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "S5WakeOnLan" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable ULP Mode: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "ULPMode" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable WakeOnDisconnect: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "WakeOnDisconnect" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Magic Packet: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "*WakeOnMagicPacket" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable Pattern Wake: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "*WakeOnPattern" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Disable WakeOnLink: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "WakeOnLink" /t REG_SZ /d "0" /f)
Set S5 Link Speed: for /f %%n in ('Reg query "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4D36E972-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002bE10318}" /v "*SpeedDuplex" /s ^| findstr "HKEY"') do (reg add "%%n" /v "WolShutdownLinkSpeed" /t REG_SZ /d "2" /f)
